root.sql: select sum(tab.row_group)over(order by tab.member_group_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,0,1 ) as row_group , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sysdate from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = '02' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/07/2023' and '30/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) tab
